record.field: ot_from_worked_days = sum(line.amount for line in payslip.worked_days_line_ids if line.code == 'OVERTIME') ot_from_input = inputs['OT'].amount if inputs.get('OT') and inputs['OT'].amount > 0 else 0 result = ot_from_worked_days + ot_from_input

result = ( result_rules.get('BASIC', {}).get('total', 0) + result_rules.get('VAC_PAY', {}).get('total', 0) + result_rules.get('OT', {}).get('total', 0) + result_rules.get('STO', {}).get('total', 0) + result_rules.get('PTO', {}).get('total', 0) + result_rules.get('CTO', {}).get('total', 0) + (inputs['BONUS'].amount if inputs.get('BONUS') else 0) + (inputs['COMMISSION'].amount if inputs.get('COMMISSION') else 0) )

gross_amount = result_rules.get('GROSS', {}).get('total', 0) if version.l10n_ca_cpp_exempt: result = 0 else: periods = payslip._l10n_ca_periods_per_year() cpp_rate = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_cpp_employee_rate') cpp_exemption = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_cpp_basic_exemption') cpp_max = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_cpp_max_contribution') period_exemption = cpp_exemption / periods pensionable = max(gross_amount - period_exemption, 0) period_contribution = pensionable * cpp_rate # CRA: annual cumulative cap, NOT per-period cap. ytd_cpp = payslip._l10n_ca_ytd_amount('CPP_EE') remaining_annual = max(cpp_max - ytd_cpp, 0) result = -min(period_contribution, remaining_annual)

gross_amount = result_rules.get('GROSS', {}).get('total', 0) if version.l10n_ca_cpp_exempt: result = 0 else: periods = payslip._l10n_ca_periods_per_year() cpp_exemption = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_cpp_basic_exemption') cpp_ympe = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_cpp_ympe') cpp2_rate = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_cpp2_rate') cpp2_ceiling = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_cpp2_ceiling') cpp2_max = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_cpp2_max_contribution') period_exemption = cpp_exemption / periods # CRA T4127 §4.4: CPP2 applies only once YTD pensionable earnings # exceed the annual YMPE. YMPE is NOT prorated per period. ytd_pensionable = payslip._l10n_ca_ytd_pensionable_earnings() period_pensionable = max(gross_amount - period_exemption, 0) new_ytd_pensionable = ytd_pensionable + period_pensionable if new_ytd_pensionable <= cpp_ympe: result = 0 else: band_low = max(ytd_pensionable, cpp_ympe) band_high = min(new_ytd_pensionable, cpp2_ceiling) cpp2_pensionable = max(band_high - band_low, 0) period_contribution = cpp2_pensionable * cpp2_rate # CRA: annual cumulative cap, NOT per-period cap. ytd_cpp2 = payslip._l10n_ca_ytd_amount('CPP2_EE') remaining_annual = max(cpp2_max - ytd_cpp2, 0) result = -min(period_contribution, remaining_annual)

gross_amount = result_rules.get('GROSS', {}).get('total', 0) if version.l10n_ca_ei_exempt: result = 0 else: ei_rate = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_ei_employee_rate') ei_max_premium = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_ei_max_premium') # CRA T4127 §4.1: EI premium = gross × rate. The only cap is the # annual premium maximum; there is no per-period insurable ceiling. period_premium = gross_amount * ei_rate ytd_ei = payslip._l10n_ca_ytd_amount('EI_EE') remaining_annual = max(ei_max_premium - ytd_ei, 0) result = -min(period_premium, remaining_annual)

gross_amount = result_rules.get('GROSS', {}).get('total', 0) rrsp = abs(result_rules.get('RRSP', {}).get('total', 0)) union = abs(result_rules.get('UNION_DUES', {}).get('total', 0)) taxable_per_period = gross_amount - rrsp - union periods = payslip._l10n_ca_periods_per_year()
# CRA T4127: CPP contributions are split into base (4.95%) and enhanced (1.00%) portions. # The base portion yields a non-refundable credit (K2); the enhanced portion plus all of # CPP2 reduce taxable income before tax is computed (T4127 variable U1). cpp_total_rate = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_cpp_employee_rate') cpp_base_rate = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_cpp_base_rate') # Canada Employment Amount — federal non-refundable credit (T4127 variable CEA) cea = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_fed_canada_employment_amount')
# K2 credit: capped projected annual CPP (base portion only) and EI — actual employee contributions. cpp_max = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_cpp_max_contribution') ei_max = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_ei_max_premium') annual_cpp = payslip._l10n_ca_projected_annual_contribution( 'CPP_EE', result_rules.get('CPP_EE', {}).get('total', 0), cpp_max) annual_ei = payslip._l10n_ca_projected_annual_contribution( 'EI_EE', result_rules.get('EI_EE', {}).get('total', 0), ei_max) # Base CPP (4.95/5.95) yields the K2 non-refundable credit — kept capped. annual_cpp_base = annual_cpp * (cpp_base_rate / cpp_total_rate) if cpp_total_rate else 0.0
# U1 (income deduction): CRA T4127 §5.2 — per-period contribution × periods, intentionally uncapped. # T4127 projects the year at the current period's rate; the annual CPP cap applies only to K2/K2P # (the non-refundable credit), NOT to the income deduction. Capping U1 overstates taxable income # for high earners whose projected annual CPP would exceed the annual maximum. period_cpp = abs(result_rules.get('CPP_EE', {}).get('total', 0)) period_enhanced_cpp = period_cpp * ((cpp_total_rate - cpp_base_rate) / cpp_total_rate) if cpp_total_rate else 0.0 annual_enhanced_cpp = period_enhanced_cpp * periods # intentionally uncapped (T4127 §5.2)
period_cpp2 = abs(result_rules.get('CPP2_EE', {}).get('total', 0)) annual_cpp2_full = period_cpp2 * periods # intentionally uncapped (T4127 §5.2)
# T4127: annual taxable income = P*(I-F-F2) - U1 (U1 = enhanced CPP + CPP2) annual_income = taxable_per_period * periods - annual_enhanced_cpp - annual_cpp2_full
fed_brackets = [ (payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_fed_bracket_1'), payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_fed_rate_1')), (payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_fed_bracket_2'), payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_fed_rate_2')), (payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_fed_bracket_3'), payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_fed_rate_3')), (payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_fed_bracket_4'), payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_fed_rate_4')), (float('inf'), payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_fed_rate_5')), ]
bpa_max = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_fed_basic_personal_amount') bpa_min = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_fed_bpa_min') phase_out_start = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_fed_bracket_3') phase_out_end = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_fed_bracket_4')
# CRA T4127 §5.1 defines a phase-out of the enhanced BPA between brackets 3 and 4 # for high earners. CRA PDOC, Wave, QuickBooks, ADP, and Ceridian do NOT apply it # (they honor the TD1 amount as filed). Both approaches are CRA-acceptable; the # checkbox lets the customer choose. Default is OFF to match PDOC behavior. if version.l10n_ca_apply_bpa_phase_out: if annual_income <= phase_out_start: fed_bpa = bpa_max elif annual_income >= phase_out_end: fed_bpa = bpa_min else: fed_bpa = bpa_max - (bpa_max - bpa_min) * (annual_income - phase_out_start) / (phase_out_end - phase_out_start) else: fed_bpa = bpa_max
tax = 0 prev_bracket = 0 for bracket, rate in fed_brackets: taxable_in_bracket = min(annual_income, bracket) - prev_bracket if taxable_in_bracket > 0: tax += taxable_in_bracket * rate prev_bracket = bracket if annual_income <= bracket: break
# K1: BPA credit + Canada Employment Amount at the lowest federal rate (T4127: K1 = R*(TC+CEA)) credit = (fed_bpa + cea) * fed_brackets[0][1]
# K2: non-refundable credit for base CPP (4.95%) and EI at the lowest federal rate. # The enhanced CPP (1.00%) and all of CPP2 are already deducted from income above. k2 = (annual_cpp_base + annual_ei) * fed_brackets[0][1]
annual_tax = max(tax - credit - k2, 0) additional = version.l10n_ca_additional_tax or 0 result = -(annual_tax / periods + additional)

gross_amount = result_rules.get('GROSS', {}).get('total', 0) rrsp = abs(result_rules.get('RRSP', {}).get('total', 0)) union = abs(result_rules.get('UNION_DUES', {}).get('total', 0)) taxable_per_period = gross_amount - rrsp - union periods = payslip._l10n_ca_periods_per_year()
# Get province from employee record (falls back to ON) province = employee.l10n_ca_province_id.code or 'ON'
# Read consolidated provincial tax config from the rule parameter. # _rule_parameter already returns a Python literal (dict). prov_config_raw = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_prov_tax_config') PROV_RAW = prov_config_raw if isinstance(prov_config_raw, dict) else None
if not PROV_RAW: # Fallback baseline (2026). Keep in sync with hr_rule_parameters_data.xml. PROV_RAW = { 'ON': {'brackets': [[53891, 0.0505], [107785, 0.0915], [150000, 0.1116], [220000, 0.1216], [0, 0.1316]], 'bpa': 12989, 'surtax': [[5818, 0.20], [7446, 0.36]]}, 'AB': {'brackets': [[61200, 0.08], [154259, 0.10], [185111, 0.12], [246813, 0.13], [370220, 0.14], [0, 0.15]], 'bpa': 22769, 'surtax': []}, 'BC': {'brackets': [[50363, 0.0506], [100728, 0.077], [115648, 0.105], [140430, 0.1229], [190405, 0.147], [265545, 0.168], [0, 0.205]], 'bpa': 13216, 'surtax': []}, 'SK': {'brackets': [[54532, 0.105], [155805, 0.125], [0, 0.145]], 'bpa': 20381, 'surtax': []}, 'MB': {'brackets': [[47000, 0.108], [100000, 0.1275], [0, 0.174]], 'bpa': 15780, 'surtax': []}, 'NB': {'brackets': [[52333, 0.094], [104666, 0.14], [193861, 0.16], [0, 0.195]], 'bpa': 13664, 'surtax': []}, 'NS': {'brackets': [[30995, 0.0879], [61991, 0.1495], [97417, 0.1667], [157124, 0.175], [0, 0.21]], 'bpa': 11932, 'surtax': []}, 'PE': {'brackets': [[33928, 0.095], [65820, 0.1347], [106890, 0.166], [142250, 0.1762], [0, 0.19]], 'bpa': 15000, 'surtax': []}, 'NL': {'brackets': [[44678, 0.087], [89354, 0.145], [159528, 0.158], [223340, 0.178], [285319, 0.198], [570638, 0.208], [1141275, 0.213], [0, 0.218]], 'bpa': 11188, 'surtax': []}, 'NT': {'brackets': [[53003, 0.059], [106009, 0.086], [172346, 0.122], [0, 0.1405]], 'bpa': 18198, 'surtax': []}, 'YT': {'brackets': [[58523, 0.064], [117045, 0.09], [181440, 0.109], [500000, 0.128], [0, 0.15]], 'bpa': 16452, 'surtax': []}, 'NU': {'brackets': [[55801, 0.04], [111602, 0.07], [181439, 0.09], [0, 0.115]], 'bpa': 19659, 'surtax': []}, }
cfg_raw = PROV_RAW.get(province) or PROV_RAW.get('ON') or {} cfg = { 'b': cfg_raw.get('brackets', []), 'bpa': cfg_raw.get('bpa', 0), 'st': cfg_raw.get('surtax', []), }
# Build brackets (0 = infinity for top bracket) prov_brackets = [] for br in cfg['b']: t = br[0] if br[0] != 0 else float('inf') prov_brackets.append((t, br[1]))
# K2P credit: capped projected annual CPP (base portion only) and EI — actual employee contributions. cpp_total_rate_p = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_cpp_employee_rate') cpp_base_rate_p = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_cpp_base_rate') cpp_max_p = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_cpp_max_contribution') ei_max_p = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_ei_max_premium') annual_cpp_p = payslip._l10n_ca_projected_annual_contribution( 'CPP_EE', result_rules.get('CPP_EE', {}).get('total', 0), cpp_max_p) annual_ei_p = payslip._l10n_ca_projected_annual_contribution( 'EI_EE', result_rules.get('EI_EE', {}).get('total', 0), ei_max_p) # Base CPP (4.95/5.95) yields the K2P non-refundable credit — kept capped. annual_cpp_base_p = annual_cpp_p * (cpp_base_rate_p / cpp_total_rate_p) if cpp_total_rate_p else 0.0
# U1 (income deduction): CRA T4127 §5.2 — per-period contribution × periods, intentionally uncapped. # T4127 projects the year at the current period's rate; the annual CPP cap applies only to K2/K2P # (the non-refundable credit), NOT to the income deduction. Capping U1 overstates taxable income # for high earners whose projected annual CPP would exceed the annual maximum. period_cpp_p = abs(result_rules.get('CPP_EE', {}).get('total', 0)) period_enhanced_cpp_p = period_cpp_p * ((cpp_total_rate_p - cpp_base_rate_p) / cpp_total_rate_p) if cpp_total_rate_p else 0.0 annual_enhanced_cpp_p = period_enhanced_cpp_p * periods # intentionally uncapped (T4127 §5.2)
period_cpp2_p = abs(result_rules.get('CPP2_EE', {}).get('total', 0)) annual_cpp2_full_p = period_cpp2_p * periods # intentionally uncapped (T4127 §5.2)
# T4127: annual taxable income = P*(I-F-F2) - U1 (U1 = enhanced CPP + CPP2) annual_income = taxable_per_period * periods - annual_enhanced_cpp_p - annual_cpp2_full_p
# Progressive tax calculation tax = 0 prev_bracket = 0 for bracket, rate in prov_brackets: taxable_in_bracket = min(annual_income, bracket) - prev_bracket if taxable_in_bracket > 0: tax += taxable_in_bracket * rate prev_bracket = bracket if annual_income <= bracket: break
# K1P — BPA credit at lowest provincial rate prov_credit = cfg['bpa'] * prov_brackets[0][1]
# K2P — credit for base CPP (4.95%) and EI at the lowest provincial rate (CRA T4127 §5.6). # The enhanced CPP (1.00%) and all of CPP2 are already deducted from income above. # CEA is federal only — provinces do not have a Canada Employment Amount. k2p = (annual_cpp_base_p + annual_ei_p) * prov_brackets[0][1]
basic_provincial_tax = max(tax - prov_credit - k2p, 0)
# Surtax (Ontario only as of 2026) surtax = 0 for s in cfg['st']: if basic_provincial_tax > s[0]: surtax += (basic_provincial_tax - s[0]) * s[1]
total_provincial_tax = basic_provincial_tax + surtax result = -(total_provincial_tax / periods)

gross_amount = result_rules.get('GROSS', {}).get('total', 0) rrsp = abs(result_rules.get('RRSP', {}).get('total', 0)) union = abs(result_rules.get('UNION_DUES', {}).get('total', 0)) taxable_per_period = gross_amount - rrsp - union periods = payslip._l10n_ca_periods_per_year() annual_income = taxable_per_period * periods
ohp_config_raw = payslip._rule_parameter('l10n_ca_ohp_config') OHP_CFG = ohp_config_raw if isinstance(ohp_config_raw, dict) else None
if not OHP_CFG or not OHP_CFG.get('tiers'): OHP_CFG = {'tiers': [ {'upto': 20000, 'base': 0, 'rate': 0, 'cap': 0}, {'upto': 36000, 'base': 0, 'rate': 0.06, 'cap': 300}, {'upto': 48000, 'base': 300, 'rate': 0.06, 'cap': 150}, {'upto': 72000, 'base': 450, 'rate': 0.25, 'cap': 150}, {'upto': 200000, 'base': 600, 'rate': 0.25, 'cap': 300}, {'upto': None, 'base': 900, 'rate': 0, 'cap': 0}, ]}
ohp = 0 prev_upto = 0 for tier in OHP_CFG['tiers']: upto = tier.get('upto') if upto is None or annual_income <= upto: delta = annual_income - prev_upto ohp = tier['base'] + (min(delta * tier['rate'], tier['cap']) if tier.get('cap') else delta * tier.get('rate', 0)) if upto is None: ohp = tier['base'] break prev_upto = upto
result = -(ohp / periods)

result = ( result_rules.get('GROSS', {}).get('total', 0) - abs(result_rules.get('RRSP', {}).get('total', 0)) - abs(result_rules.get('UNION_DUES', {}).get('total', 0)) - abs(result_rules.get('CPP_EE', {}).get('total', 0)) - abs(result_rules.get('CPP2_EE', {}).get('total', 0)) - abs(result_rules.get('EI_EE', {}).get('total', 0)) - abs(result_rules.get('FED_TAX', {}).get('total', 0)) - abs(result_rules.get('PROV_TAX', {}).get('total', 0)) - abs(result_rules.get('OHP', {}).get('total', 0)) )
